data.title: Retired Australian officer loses $1.2M in Thai crypto scam, amidst rising crypto adoption and scam incidents.
data.description: As the use of digital assets continues to rise, there has been a notable surge in the number of funds lost due to fraudulent schemes and cyberattacks.

data.title: Investors in Capricor Therapeutics (between Oct 9, 2024 and July 10, 2025) urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP for potential claims.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner, James Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who incurred losses in Capricor to reach out to him directly to explore potential options. If you bought or obtained Capricor securities within the period of October 9, 2024, to July 10, 2025, and wish to discuss further actions, contact him.

data.title: Sutherland and Philippine Govt launch AI Academy to train Filipinos for AI-driven future workforce.
data.description: In Rochester, New York, Sutherland has announced a collaboration with the Philippine Government to establish an AI Academy. The Academy aims to prepare the workforce in the Philippines for a future heavily reliant on artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: China bans promotion of stablecoins, ordering firms to cease seminars and research due to fraud risks and speculation fears.
data.description: Chinese regulatory authorities have mandated local companies to discontinue conducting seminars and research on stablecoins due to worries about possible fraud and speculation influenced by group behavior.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is investigating claims for investors of Hims & Hers Health who suffered losses between April 29, 2025 and June 22, 2025. Contact them for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who experienced losses in Hims to reach out to him for a consultation about their legal options. If you bought or obtained securities in Hims within the period from April 29, 2025, to June 22, 2025, and are interested in exploring your potential avenues for recourse, Wilson is available to assist. Get in touch to discuss your situation in further detail and evaluate how to proceed.

data.title: CNOOC Limited started Yellowtail Project ahead of schedule in Stabroek Block offshore. Stocks: SEHK 00883, 80883, SSE 600938.
data.description: On August 8, 2025, CNOOC Limited (SEHK: 00883, 80883; SSE: 600938) reported that the Yellowtail Project has begun production earlier than planned. This project, situated in the Stabroek Block offshore, is a significant development for the company.

data.title: XRP price surges 200% on futures volume increase, reaching $4.50 as Ripple lawsuit resolves, bullish trend continues.
data.description: The price of XRP is anticipated to gradually rise towards $4.50 in the upcoming months, driven by a breakout from a traditional bullish continuation pattern.

data.title: Law firm investigating claims for investors of iRobot Corporation. Purchase date: Jan 29, 2024 - Mar 11, 2025. Losses reported. Contact for options.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, the Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who have experienced losses in iRobot to reach out to him personally to explore their potential courses of action. If you bought or obtained securities in iRobot within the period from January 29, 2024, to March 11, 2025, and are interested in discussing your options, please contact Mr. Wilson directly.

data.title: Tradr to launch 2X leveraged ETFs on Astera Labs and Datadog on Tuesday, targeting professional traders.
data.description: Tradr ETFs, a leading provider of ETFs tailored for advanced investors and professional traders, is preparing to introduce 2X ETFs for Astera Labs and Datadog on Tuesday. This new offering marks the first of its kind in the market, providing investors with leveraged exposure to these two companies. The launch is scheduled for Aug. 8, 2025, in New York. These innovative ETFs are expected to attract significant attention from traders looking to amplify their investment strategies with Astera Labs and Datadog, promising high growth potential.

data.title: "China Automotive Semiconductor Market booming with domestic leadership and foreign investment. China's exports reached $419.15 billion in 2024, up from $280.81 billion in 2020."
data.description: A report on the China Semiconductor Market for Automotive is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. It includes information on components such as Microcontrollers, Power Semiconductors, Sensors & MEMS Devices, Memory Chips, and Analog & Mixed Signal ICs. The report highlights the growth in China's automotive semiconductor exports, which rose to USD 419.15 billion in 2024 from USD 280.81 billion in 2020, showing a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 8.9%.

(Reuters) - J.P.Morgan now expects the U.S. Federal Reserve to cut interest rates by 25 basis points at its September meeting, citing signs of weakness in the labor market and uncertainty around President Donald Trump's latest Fed nomination.

data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Biohaven investors from March 24, 2023 to May 14, 2025. Contact for losses.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who experienced losses in Biohaven to reach out to him to explore potential strategies. If you bought or obtained Biohaven securities during the period from March 24, 2023, to May 14, 2025, and are interested in seeking guidance, Wilson is available for direct consultation. Investors are encouraged to discuss their options for a potential resolution.
